Brawl Stars · analítica, estrategia y li: Brawl Stars · analytics, strategy and leagues
Brawlers aliados con los que más ganas c: Allied brawlers you win most with when they're on your team.
Brawlers anunciados que aún no han salid: Announced brawlers that haven't been released yet. They don't count toward the collection or the meta; their details are filled in as Supercell publishes official information.
Buen win rate pero los juegas poco: debe: Good win rate but you play them little: you should pick them more.
Cada partida con sus equipos, retratos y: Every match with its teams, portraits and trophies. You can manually note kills, deaths, damage and healing (optional data the API doesn't provide). Click the map to view its image.
Cada ronda forma equipos al azar de: Each round forms random teams of
Cada vez que se aprueba un cambio se gua: Every time a change is approved, the previous version is saved. If information has been lost, you can restore it.
Veces que cada pareja de equipos se vuel: Times each pair of teams plays each other again before the league ends.
Crea rondas con «+» y elige sus modos y: Create rounds with «+» and choose their modes and maps (pick several or none). Then, in «Matches», press «Generate round»: if you left the mode/map unset, one is proposed at random (auto-approved after 24 h if nobody responds).
La modalidad no se puede cambiar con jug: The mode can't be changed while players are signed up: remove them first (with a reason) and have them sign up again.
Debes indicar un motivo para quitar al j: You must give a reason to remove the player
Jugador quitado; se le ha notificado el: Player removed; they were notified of the reason
Los participantes recibirán una notifica: Participants will get a notification with the reason and can accept or object. If a single person objects, it is not changed.
Explica por qué cambias el modo/mapa…: Explain why you are changing the mode/map…
Elige qué modos y mapas entran en cada r: Choose which modes and maps go in each round (pick several or none = random). When the round is generated one of the options is proposed and you confirm it; after that it is locked.
Presenta tu evento: reglas, premios, req: Introduce your event: rules, prizes, requirements…
Se rellenan solas con el modelo elegido;: Auto-filled from the chosen model; edit them if you want.
✎ Estás editando el evento. Cambia los c: ✎ You are editing the event. Change the fields directly and press Save.
Los modos y mapas de cada ronda se elige: The modes and maps of each round are chosen with the «+» button of «Modes and maps per round», below.
Claude redactará un resumen de los resul: Claude will write a summary of the results and send it as a notice to the event's followers and participants. Continue?
Clic en la cabecera de una categoría par: Click a category header to collapse/expand it. Drag it by the header to change its order (it collapses while dragging).
Colaboraciones limitadas que ya no se pu: Limited collaborations that can no longer be obtained or used. They don't count toward the collection or the meta — just a memory of what happened.
Comparison of your win rate by mode.
Completa los resultados de la ronda actu: Complete the results of the current round to generate the next one.
Con qué brawler rindes mejor en cada mod: Which brawler you perform best with in each mode. Green = you're on point, red = you struggle.
Con qué roles tienes mejor win rate (con: Which roles you have the best win rate with (the ones you play best).
Configura ANTHROPIC_API_KEY en el .env p: Set ANTHROPIC_API_KEY in the .env to enable it.
Contra los que mejor win rate tienes (mí: Those you have the best win rate against (min. 2 matches)
Contra los que peor win rate tienes (mín: Those you have the worst win rate against (min. 2 matches)
Password must be at least 6 characters.
Cruzamos tus brawlers y tu win rate con: We cross your brawlers and your win rate with the meta to tell you where to focus.

Da formato con la barra: subtítulos, lis: Format using the toolbar: subheadings, lists, quotes, boxes, tables and images. Existing formatting is preserved.
Datos manuales (opcionales, de la pantal: Manual data (optional, from the end screen)
Define objetivos que la app pueda compro: Define goals that the app can verify on its own from your matches.
Deja el tracker corriendo mientras se ju: Leave the tracker running while you play.
Doble eliminación: hay cuadro de ganador: Double elimination: there is a winners' and losers' bracket; you are eliminated after two losses.
Déjalo en blanco para las normas estánda: Leave it blank for the model's standard rules, or describe your own…
Where you perform best by mode.
Dónde rinde mejor según el modo (win rat: Where you perform best by mode (win rate weighted by number of matches).

El modo y el mapa se eligen por ronda, a: The mode and map are chosen per round, above in the details.

En eliminación no puede haber empate: There can be no draw in elimination

En eventos individuales puedes usar Supe: In individual events you can use solo or duo Showdown.
Entonces se sienta a leer tu juego (lo q: Then he sits down to read your game (what your battles say about you) and gives you the lesson: a clear summary of your strengths, your bad habits and what your next step is, along with some challenges designed to train exactly that.

Introduce tu contraseña actual y la nuev: Enter your current password and the new one.
Juega al menos una partida con cierto nú: Play at least one match with a certain number of different brawlers (for 'play with each brawler'; narrow it to a mode/map if you want).
Juega este mapa para ver tus mejores bra: Play this map to see your best brawlers.

La API de Brawl Stars responde con norma: The Brawl Stars API is responding normally.
La nueva contraseña debe tener al menos: The new password must be at least 6 characters.
La nueva contraseña y su confirmación no: The new password and its confirmation do not match.
La sección de Eventos es tu espacio para: The Events section is your space to create and self-manage Brawl Stars competitions: tournaments and leagues that you can open to the platform's whole community or keep private to enjoy only with your club, your group or your friends. The idea is that BrawlSensei doesn't stop at individual analytics, but also serves as a meeting point to organize activity around the game and bring life to the community behind it.
Las vueltas de una liga, o el número de: The legs of a league, or the number of rounds of a tournament (Swiss, McMahon, random).
Liga libre: los jugadores concretan sus: Free league: players arrange their matches freely within the date range; points are accumulated per win.
Los acuerdan los jugadores en cada enfre: The players agree on them in each match.
Los datos se acumulan mientras el tracke: Data accumulates while the tracker is running. The API only keeps the last 25 matches of each player.
Los juegas mucho pero con mal win rate:: You play them a lot but with a bad win rate: you may want to cut back or review them.
Los jugadores solicitan plaza y tú las a: Players request a spot and you accept them.
Mapas y modos públicos desde la publicac: Maps and modes public from publication
Marca al menos una condición con su obje: Select at least one condition with its target.
Marca al menos una opción en cada filtro: Select at least one option in each filter (type, acceptance and language) to see events.
McMahon: los puntos incluyen la ventaja: McMahon: points include the initial trophy advantage (snapshot when pairing the 1st round).
Mejores brawlers aquí cruzando el meta c: Best brawlers here by cross-referencing the community meta with your history.
Modo reordenar: arrastra los elementos d: Reorder mode: drag the index items. Subsections are dragged within their section.
Modos y mapas por ronda · aleatorios: Modes and maps per round · random
Modos y mapas por ronda · fijos: Modes and maps per round · fixed
Modos y mapas que dan trofeos ahora mism: Modes and maps giving trophies right now
Montar uno lleva un momento: eliges si e: Setting one up takes a moment: you choose whether it's a league or tournament, individual or team-based, its format (Swiss, single elimination, round robin…) and the rules (rounds, points, modes and maps). You sign up players by their ID (or let them register themselves from the public board), generate each round and record the results; the system can even detect them on its own from your friendly matches. The standings update automatically and followers receive notifications about what interests them, so all that's left for you is to enjoy the competition.
Nada destacable: no tienes brawlers con: Nothing notable: you have no brawlers with a good win rate and few matches.
Nada que revisar: no abusas de ningún br: Nothing to review: you are not overusing any weak brawler.
Necesitas algunas partidas más para ver: You need a few more matches to see the progression.
You need a few more matches to see recent form.

Qué jugar ahora según tu win rate, y con: What to play now based on your win rate, and which brawler you perform best with in each mode.
Qué roles usas más (cada brawler pesa en: Which roles you use most (each brawler counts in its primary and secondary role).
Rendimiento ajustado a la dificultad con: Performance adjusted to difficulty with each brawler (W/L · Star Player).
Reparto de tus partidas por modo de jueg: Breakdown of your matches by game mode.
Requiere confirmación del organizador (s: Requires organizer confirmation (if you disable it, anyone with the password gets in directly)
Result detected from a friendly match.
Se añadirá como última sección del índic: It will be added as the last section of the index. Subject to review.
Selecciona un apartado en el índice para: Select a section in the index to begin. This guide is collaborative: you can edit any entry or create sections, subsections and separators. Your changes are sent for review and published once an administrator approves them.
Select it and copy it manually (Ctrl+C).

Sistema McMahon: como el suizo, pero con: McMahon system: like Swiss, but with starting points based on each player's level or category. Ideal for many participants of varying levels.
Sistema suizo: cada ronda empareja a jug: Swiss system: each round pairs players with a similar score. There is no elimination; a fixed number of rounds is played and whoever scores the most points wins.
Solo con contraseña; puedes exigir ademá: Password only; you can also require your confirmation.
Solo lo que sale de tus registros de bat: Only what comes from your battle logs: wins, matches played, win rate (over a minimum number of matches), win streaks, distinct brawlers you win with, net trophies and times you're Star Player. Each goal can be narrowed to a brawler or a mode. No manual data (not "deal X damage"): if the app doesn't record it, it can't be measured.
Solo puedes inscribir cada ID una vez, p: You can only register each ID once, but you can sign up several IDs from your account.
Todavía no has cumplido ninguno. ¡A por: You haven't completed any yet. Go for them!
Todo lo nuevo de Brawl Stars: cambios de: Everything new in Brawl Stars: balance changes, upcoming brawlers, new modes and events, and other adjustments. From the
Todos contra todos: cada participante se: Round robin: each participant faces all the others. Whoever accumulates the most points wins. It can be played in one or several rounds.
Todos los cambios de balance del juego,: All the game's balance changes, update by update. Click a date to see its buffs and nerfs.
Top 200 de clubs. Resalto el tuyo si apa: Top 200 clubs. I highlight yours if it appears.
Top 200 de jugadores por trofeos. Si est: Top 200 players by trophies. If you're in it, I highlight you.
Tu colección al completo: nivel, rango,: Your full collection: level, rank, Star Powers and Gadgets you own, and your win rate with each. Click a brawler to see its page.
Tu win rate frente a rivales más fuertes: Your win rate against stronger or weaker opponents.
Tu win rate por mapa (mín. 2 partidas): Your win rate by map (min. 2 matches)
Tus brawlers por número de partidas: Your brawlers by number of matches
Tus brawlers por rendimiento ajustado a: Your brawlers by difficulty-adjusted performance (min. 3 matches)
Tus brawlers por win rate puro (mín. 3 p: Your brawlers by pure win rate (min. 3 matches)
Tus cambios se enviarán a revisión y se: Your changes will be sent for review and published once an administrator approves them.
Un separador organiza un bloque temático: A separator organizes a thematic block. Subject to review.
Una clasificación propia entre los jugad: Your own standings among the players you choose (friends, club, rivals…). Sorted by trophies.
Ver la lista de buffs y nerfs en Tier Li: See the list of buffs and nerfs in Tier Lists
Win rate cuando van en tu equipo (mín. 2: Win rate when they are on your team (min. 2 matches)
Win rate en ventana móvil (50% = línea d: Win rate in a moving window (50% = dotted line).

de Brawl Stars, gestionar los enfrentami: of Brawl Stars, manage the matchups and standings, and notify followers. This guide explains each parameter.

no los sigue ningún usuario (huérfanos,: aren't followed by any user (orphans, added by hand). Deleting stops collecting their matches; it will ask whether to keep their history or not.
para crear los enfrentamientos. En cada: to create the matchups. In each one you enter the result: winner, draw or

un evento para tenerlo a mano y recibir: an event to keep it handy and receive its notifications. un viejo zorro que estudia tu forma de j: an old fox who studies the way you play, points you toward improvement and teaches you to walk that path on your own.
y ordenados por tu win rate. Para cada m: and sorted by your win rate. For each map I suggest your three best brawlers based on your history.

¿Aprobar TODOS los cambios pendientes? S: Approve ALL pending changes? They will be published in order.
¿Borrar esta liguilla? Desaparecerá tamb: Delete this league? It will also disappear for anyone who imported it.
¿Borrar este equipo? Sus jugadores queda: Delete this team? Its players will be left without a team.
¿Borrar este reto? Si participa más gent: Delete this challenge? If more people are participating, only you will be removed and the challenge will continue.
¿Cerrar la ronda actual? Los enfrentamie: Close the current round? Pending matches will be marked as NOT PLAYED (void, 0 points for both).
¿Con qué ID te apuntas?: Which ID are you signing up with?
¿Eliminar este evento? Esta acción no se: Delete this event? This action cannot be undone.
¿Emparejar la ronda 1? Se tomará el snap: Pair round 1? A trophy snapshot of each account will be taken.
¿En qué consiste el cambio?: What does the change consist of?

¿Quieres explorar algún estilo en partic: Do you want to explore any style in particular?
¿Quitar esta liguilla importada de tu cu: Remove this imported league from your account?
¿Resetear el entrenamiento? Se abandonar: Reset training? Your active Sensei challenges will be abandoned so you can request a new report.
¿Sobre qué brawlers quieres consultar?: Which brawlers do you want to ask about?
¿Te preocupa algún mapa en especial?: Are you worried about any map in particular?
— responde a lo que te interese, o déjal: — answer what interests you, or leave it blank for an analysis of your whole account
